plant_message: Alice Chen is the Engineering Lead. She owns the backend architecture decisions, runs the weekly tech sync on Mondays at 10:00 UTC, and is the escalation point for P0 incidents
Bob Okafor is the DevOps / Platform lead. He owns Kubernetes, Terraform, and the CI/CD pipeline. His PagerDuty handle is @bob-okafor, Slack handle @bob-o
Maria Santos is the Product Manager. She writes all PRDs in Notion, owns the roadmap in Linear, and is the single source of truth for feature prioritization
David Kim is the Frontend Lead. Owns the React codebase, design system, and Storybook. He does design QA every Thursday at 15:00 UTC with the UX team
Priya Nair is the Data Engineer. She owns the Airflow DAGs, the analytics Postgres cluster, and all dbt models. Office hours Friday 14:00-15:00 UTC
Our AWS account manager is James Wilson at AWS, contact james.wilson@amazon.com. Enterprise support ticket portal: https://support.aws.amazon.com, support tier: Business
recall_queries: What tier of AWS support do we have?

plant_message: Cloudflare account managed by @bob-o. Primary account email ops@clawbrain.io. Zone locks enabled on prod domain. Changes require 2FA confirmation and approval from DevOps lead
GDPR Data Protection Officer is legal@clawbrain.io, response SLA 48 hours for internal requests. External GDPR requests forward to dpo@clawbrain.io, fulfilled within 72 hours by law
Current on-call rotation schedule: Week 1 Alice, Week 2 Bob, Week 3 Yusuf, Week 4 Sarah. Rotation repeats. Handoff every Monday 09:00 UTC
Security team lead is Fatima Al-Rashid, security@clawbrain.io. All security incidents go to #security-incidents Slack channel. Penetration test scheduled for Q3 by CrowdStrike
External UX contractor: Sofia Reyes from DesignHive agency, sofia.reyes@designhive.io. Works Tuesday-Thursday, delivers Figma files to the shared drive /Design/Deliverables
Legal counsel for contracts: Reed Smith LLP, primary contact partner@reedsmith.com. Turnaround for NDAs: 3 business days. For enterprise contracts: 2 weeks minimum
Engineering budget owner is Alice Chen for headcount, Bob Okafor for infrastructure. AWS spend reports sent every Monday to #aws-costs Slack channel. Monthly budget: $85,000 infra
Key enterprise customer: Acme Corp, account managed by sales rep Lucas Torres, customer success contact Aisha Johnson. Acme is on a custom SLA: 99.99% uptime, 15min response
Summer 2024 interns: Wei Zhang (backend, mentored by Alice), Tomás García (frontend, mentored by David). Intern PRs require mentor approval before senior review. End date August 30
Technical advisor: Dr. Kenji Watanabe, ML specialist from Stanford. Monthly 1hr advisory call, first Tuesday of every month. Focused on our Neocortex distillation quality roadmap
Integration partner: Zapier. Technical contact Raj Patel at Zapier, raj.patel@zapier.com. Our Zapier app ID is 12847, in beta review. ETA for public launch: Q4 2024
Board observer: Serena Obi from Sequoia Capital, serena.obi@sequoiacap.com. Board meetings quarterly, next one October 15. Deck must be submitted 1 week in advance
IT admin and hardware provisioning: Marcus Lee, it@clawbrain.io, Slack @marcus-it. New hardware requests: submit via Notion IT Request template, 5 business day lead time
QA lead: Nadia Volkov, owns the test strategy and Playwright suite. She signs off on every release. QA environment URL: https://qa.clawbrain.io, refreshed every Sunday at 02:00 UTC
